'''Fortress Kh'aris''' was a fortress built on [[Kintan/Legends|Kintan]] by [[Kh'aris Fenn]], sometime before his attempted return to [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] in [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]]. [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] apparently was involved in its building. Kh'aris equipped his fortress with as many [[Droid/Legends|droids]] as possible, including [[AX/RX]], although by 30 BBY he employed two [[Morgukai]], [[Tsyr]] and [[Bok]].

It was abandoned in 30 BBY after [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] and [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] infiltrated it to rescue [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]] and [[Nat Secura]], who had been kidnapped by Fenn.
